items.title: VI Live: Newcastle trakteert meegereisde PSV-fans op gratis drankje
items.summary: PSV stuit woensdag op Newcastle United in speelronde zeven van de competitiefase van de Champions League. In deze VI Live mis je niets van dat belangrijke duel.

items.title: Dit is het speelschema voor de kwartfinale van de Eurojackpot KNVB Beker
items.summary: De KNVB heeft het speelschema voor de kwartfinale van de Eurojackpot KNVB Beker bekendgemaakt. Landskampioen PSV speelt op woensdag, titelverdediger Go Ahead Eagles sluit de bekerweek af.

items.title: Bellingham on drinking celeb: 'I know the truth'
items.summary: Jude Bellingham described his drinking gesture goal celebration as "a bit of a joke" aimed at speculation about his off-the-field behaviour.

items.title: City's Guardiola: Everything is going against us
items.summary: Pep Guardiola admitted he was left with the feeling that "everything is going wrong" for his Manchester City side.

items.title: Vinícius Júnior wants Real Madrid stay after '27
items.summary: Vinícius Júnior has reiterated his desire to continue at Real Madrid beyond 2027 when his contract expires, despite admitting his last year has been difficult.

items.title: French government not in favour of World Cup 2026 boycott over Greenland threats
items.summary: Minister says there is ‘no desire’ to boycott tournament But Coquerel says US should be stripped of World Cup The French government is not in favour of boycotting this year’s World Cup being co-hosted by the United States over Donald Trump’s Greenland threats, France’s sports minister has said. Trump has targeted France among the eight European countries threatened with tariffs for their opposition to his drive to annex Greenland, an autonomous territory of Denmark. Continue reading...

items.title: Skiete Willy Podcast Extra: zo wil PSV het aanpakken tegen 'beestachtig' Newcastle
items.summary: Tim Reedijk en Sjoerd Keizer blikken in deze Skiete Willy Podcast Extra vooruit op het Champions League-duel van PSV met Newcastle United. De mannen hebben het over de stad, het stadion, transfers, de tactiek en trainer Peter Bosz. Maar ook over de platte kar, die misschien zelfs al in maart gereed moet zijn...

items.title: Between Gabriel Jesus and Gyökeres, Arsenal's striker battle is heating up
items.summary: Gabriel Jesus and Viktor Gyökeres each staked their claim to Arsenal's No. 9 spot in their 3-1 win over Inter Milan.

items.title: Vinícius Júnior roars back into form, much to the Bernabéu's delight
items.summary: It's been a rollercoaster of a week, but a convincing win over Monaco has gotten Real Madrid back on track.

items.title: Victor Jensen maanden eruit
items.summary: Victor Jensen staat maanden aan de kant. Dat heeft zijn club FC Utrecht woensdagmiddag bevestigd. De Deense middenvelder moet revalideren van een serieuze knieblessure.

items.title: Women's Club World Cup schedule could be 'catastrophic' for WSL
items.summary: English players and officials are shocked by the current scheduling for the inaugural Women's Club World Cup because of the impact it could have on the WSL.

items.title: 'Szymanski ruilt Fenerbahçe in voor Ligue 1'
items.summary: Sebastian Szymanski heeft naar verluidt een nieuwe club gevonden. De oud-Feyenoorder verruilt Fenerbahçe voor Stade Rennes. De Franse club legt om en nabij tien miljoen euro voor hem op tafel.

items.title: Bournemouth close on £30.6m move for Brazilian striker Rayan
items.summary: The 19-year-old is in advanced talks about moving to the south coast and will help the Cherries replace Antoine Semenyo, who joined Manchester City last week.

items.title: Women’s Club World Cup row builds as WSL warns of ‘catastrophic’ impact
items.summary: League wants tournament dates switched to summer Clubs and players believed to be opposed to schedule The inaugural Women’s Club World Cup’s January 2028 dates “could be catastrophic”, the Women’s Super League has said, with the league raising serious concerns over the potential impact of the tournament on domestic calendars. A WSL spokesperson said on Wednesday that the league is firmly against the dates and have made their case strongly to Fifa, who have announced that the competition will be held from 5–30 January 2028. Continue reading...

items.title: Mateta tells Palace he wants to leave amid Villa and Juve interest
items.summary: Jean-Philippe Mateta has told Crystal Palace he wants to leave the club this January, amid interest from Aston Villa and Juventus.

items.title: Premier League clubs spent £1.92bn on forwards - why are so many struggling?
items.summary: Premier League clubs scrambled to add firepower during the summer transfer window, spending a record £1.92bn on players categorised as forwards. So why are so many struggling?

items.title: Marseille agree loan deal for Arsenal's Nwaneri
items.summary: French club Marseille agree to sign Arsenal midfielder Ethan Nwaneri on loan for the rest of the season.

items.title: Significant sexual safety problem for women working in elite UK sport, says survey
items.summary: 88% target of sexual misconduct in the past five years 260 members of Women’s Sport Collective took survey There is a significant sexual safety problem for women working in elite sport in the UK, according to a survey, with 88% of respondents reporting they had been the target of at least one form of sexual misconduct in the past five years and five people (2%) saying they had been raped in work-related contexts outside the main workplace in that period. The report published on Wednesday, titled Women’s Experiences of Sexual Misconduct Working in UK Elite Sport, invited members of the Women’s Sport Collective to take part in the study anonymously and 260 people responded. Participants included administrators, coaches, current and former athletes, TV producers, lawyers and physios. Continue reading...

items.title: Sky announces new partnership with Team GB and ParalympicsGB
items.summary: Sky has announced a new partnership with Team GB and ParalympicsGB, reinforcing its commitment to British sport, and bringing the country together around significant cultural moments, inspiring stories and achievements that matter most.
